headline: Is Iron Mountain Incorporated (IRM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is IRM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Iron Mountain Incorporated on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on IRM. Iron Mountain Incorporated’s share was trading at $123.50 as of June 8th. IRM’s trailing and forward P/E were 135.50 and 62.50 respectively according to Yahoo […]
